interpretation: 1pp mortgage rate increase = 4.8 OFI point increase
millennial_wave: Peak FHA demand 2027-2028 (Millennials 31-47yo). Fed easing + demographic wave = OFI likely 35-42 range by 2028. Biggest opportunity since 2021.

enhanced_model.vs_simple: Simple (rate only) MAE=4.16 → Enhanced MAE=2.13 (49% improvement)
enhanced_model.key_insight: Rate DIRECTION matters as much as rate LEVEL. Rising rates compress OFI faster than the level alone suggests. Falling rates ease OFI with double effect.
enhanced_model.practical: When Fed signals rate cuts, OFI improvement is amplified by momentum effect. First cut triggers outsized OFI easing.
enhanced_model.winner: mortgage_rate + rate_change — treasury/CPI/unemployment add noise not signal

quarterly_model.seasonality_finding: Minimal seasonal effect — OFI driven by rate cycle not calendar quarter
quarterly_model.yield_curve_insight: Inverted yield curve (negative 10Y-2Y) precedes OFI tightening by 1-2 quarters
quarterly_model.key_finding: mortgage + momentum + yield_curve is optimal quarterly combination
